project: AI Video Production Workspace GPT Bridge Line
title: Local MCP Package Acceptance Review
scope: review the R2G local MCP package before any live ChatGPT connector preparation
probe input validation and descriptor immutability
record findings without changing implementation code
goal: Determine whether the local R2G MCP package is safe to move toward live ChatGPT connector preparation.
acceptance: Review report includes findings or no-issue acceptance decision.
Review verifies R2G reports, schema fixture, tests, fail-closed boundaries, and live connector stop boundary.
Report records provider, credential, public tunnel, connector, publish, deploy, and production configuration boundaries as false.
validation: JSON parse for R2G-A through R2G-F reports and schema fixture
manual negative probe: forbidden provider / fake ids / missing required field
manual negative probe: extra unexpected field
claimed_by: Codex R2G-H local MCP acceptance review
completed_by: Codex R2G-H local MCP acceptance review
boundary_or_safety_stop: R2G local MCP package is blocked before live connector preparation until R2G-H1 hardening fixes are completed
blocked_reason: R2G-H found outputSchema/error-envelope mismatch, missing server-side additionalProperties enforcement, and mutable nested tool descriptor metadata.
safe_actions_completed: reviewed R2G local MCP bridge implementation, tests, fixture, and reports
ran typecheck and R2G MCP tests
ran manual negative probes for forbidden provider actions, fake IDs, missing required fields, extra unexpected fields, and descriptor immutability
options_for_jenn: Keep R2G-G as FOLLOW_UP until R2G-H1 is completed and accepted.
